title: Thank you for the thorough and highly actionable review.
excerpt: Thank you for the thorough and highly actionable review. You’re absolutely right: while the current code handles concurrency properly with sync.Mutex, it’s overly optimistic and missing the resilience safeguards needed f…

content.html: Thank you for the thorough and highly actionable review. You’re absolutely right: while the current code handles concurrency properly with sync.Mutex, it’s overly optimistic and missing the resilience safeguards needed for real-world WooCommerce environments.
